dashboard.motivationMissing: You haven't provided a motivation letter yet. Completing this helps your application immensely.
dashboard.startJourneyDesc: You are currently a Guest. Apply now to become a Student.

Applied.title: Initial Review
Applied.action: Our team is currently verifying your request. Please wait for approval to start the document phase.

Documents.title: Documents Needed
Documents.action: You are approved! Please upload your passport, certificates, and medical records to proceed.

Interview.title: Agency Interview
Interview.action: Prepare for your screening. We will contact you via Skype or Phone to schedule your interview.

Matching.title: Family Matching
Matching.action: Your profile is live! We are sharing it with host families. Keep your phone reachable for matching calls.

Visa.title: Visa Process
Visa.action: Match found! Prepare your embassy documents and schedule your visa appointment immediately.

Departure.title: Final Departure
Departure.action: Visa granted! Pack your bags and check your pre-departure guide for your trip to Europe.

germany.title: Germany

belgium.title: Belgium
belgium.subtitle: International Hub
belgium.desc: Experience multilingual culture at the headquarters of the European Union.

switzerland.title: Switzerland
switzerland.subtitle: Highest Quality of Life
switzerland.desc: Live with the world's highest allowance, purest air, and safest environment.
